text: This recommendation provides a formal definition of the term halogen bond as a name for a class of inter- and intramolecular forces. According to this definition an halogen bond is an attractive force associated with the interaction between an electrophilic region of a halogen atom within a molecular entity and a nucleophilic region within the same or different molecular entities.
headline: Fully Human Written
